====Status unknown====
When fighting three {{tc|Team Aqua Grunt}}s at [[Mt. Chimney]] in Pokémon Sapphire and Alpha Sapphire, Maxie is seen with a {{p|Poochyena}}. It is unknown if this Poochyena is related to his Mightyena.
